notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa grounds into a double play, shortstop Jorge Mateo to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Tim Tawa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Jorge Barrosa scores.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski grounds into a double play, first baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Matt Olson out at 2nd. Mike Yastrzemski out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Brandon Pfaadt. Mauricio Dubón scores.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith flies out to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.

notableEvents.label: Ronald Acuña Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley pops out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley flies out to right fielder Corbin Carroll.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Jorge Barrosa scores.
